_comment: EXAMPLE (rc.14 · WS6) — a signal-triggered assurance CASE run to closure within SLA. A model-monitoring signal (drift on the credit model) opened a high-severity case: assessed within 24h, mapped to the model-provenance control, contained by a model fallback, second-line decided by Aisha (Model Risk), and closed. Mounts at docs/governance/assurance-cases/<id>.json. Times are illustrative; in operation they are stamped by the orchestrator.

signal.summary: PSI drift above threshold on the credit-decision model

run_tests.note: re-ran the model eval suite against the live population

remediation.note: fell back to the champion model; challenger queued for revalidation
